name: code-music
description: Background music for your coding sessions — lofi, jazz, classical, ambient, electronic, and more

interface.longDescription: Stream lofi, jazz, classical, ambient, electronic, synthwave, lounge, and indie music while you code. Includes an AI DJ, Pomodoro timer, and preference learning.
defaultPrompt: Use Code Music to play some lofi while I code.
Use Code Music to let the DJ pick music for my session.
